\tzpentry{ID4207}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4207 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_M[\vec{A}] = \int_{\mathcal{V}} \vec{A} \cdot (\nabla \times \vec{A}) \, d^3x = \int_{\mathcal{V}} \vec{A} \cdot \vec{B} \, d^3x \end{equation}
